title: Retain item selection when switching board view
excerpt:
Currently, when having items selected in one board-view, the selection is lost, when switching to another board-view. 
In some scenarios that can be quite frustrating.

posts.author: Semioticom (David Egert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, when having items selected in one board-view, the selection is lost, when switching to another board-view.
